entries.title: Modest Mouse deals with death and breathes life into a new album that 'actually is ours'
entries.description: Three decades after Modest Mouse's scrappy Northwest beginnings, Isaac Brock returns with "An Eraser And A Maze," a new album he says finally feels wholly theirs.

entries.title: Spotify accused of using new streaming policy to reduce indie artist's royalties
entries.description: Mark Kratter, a Connecticut-based musician, is suing Spotify for engaging in what he alleges are "unfair business practices." The complaint claims that streaming metrics have been altered to prioritize major artists and labels above smaller indie musicians.

entries.title: Karmelo Anthony convicted of murder in Texas track meet stabbing
entries.description: A Texas jury on Tuesday found Karmelo Anthony guilty of murder in the fatal stabbing of 17-year-old Austin Metcalf at a Frisco high school track meet last year, concluding a closely watched trial that drew national attention over questions of race, self-defense and school safety.

entries.title: Jury reaches guilty verdict in Karmelo Anthony murder trial
entries.description: Karmelo Anthony, 19, was found guilty of the 2025 murder of fellow high school student Austin Metcalf at a district-wide meet in Frisco, a Dallas suburb. Anthony’s legal team argued he acted in self-defense after he’d sat in the bleachers under the tent of rival high school Memorial and was confronted by members of its track team and told to leave.

entries.title: Drone boat helps rescue U.S. Army helicopter crew shot down near Strait of Hormuz
entries.description: An unmanned surface vessel -- or drone boat -- helped rescue two Army crew members whose AH-64 Apache helicopter was shot down near the Strait of Hormuz late Monday, according to government officials and defense industry sources.

entries.title: New sunscreen option wins FDA approval after years of delay

entries.title: U.S. begins retaliatory strikes on Iran after Apache helicopter downed near Strait of Hormuz
